---
title: "Charles Collins"
---

## Charles Collins

### Description

son of George and Martha Collins, of the Post Office, Otterbourne

### Biography

The Collins family consisted of George Collins, (b. 1818/9) of the Post Office, Otterbourne, groom and gardener, his wife Martha (Andrews) and several children of whom CMY mentions George (b. 1839/40), Elizabeth,  Charles (b.1840/1) and Anne (b. 1846/7). [1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from February 24, 1854.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
